title: Cobblmon Home
description: A way to store ur pokemons beetween servers with mysql
body:
Cobblemon Home let u share ur pokemons beetween servers / worlds
u can fully translate Cobblemon Home in your language with a config file that is loaded at start (you can alway reload it with cobblemon-home reload).
customizations cobblemon-home have colors and text modifiers placeholders that let u  edit the style to match your own ex <bold> or the others minecraft color  .
server friendly  it uses mysql/mariadb so its usable pretty everywhere as server owners.
pokemons after transfer are the same of before without loosing a stats or a single xp point
Completely serverside.
